verses.text: Topa in uk a, vangliatna kumpi puan kisilhsak hi. Topa, kumpi puan kisilhsak a, thahatna tawh amah kidim hi. Leitung kikipsak a, kiling ngeilo ding hi
Tanglai pek panin na tokhom a kipsa hi a, nang pen a tawntunga om na hi hi
Topa aw, gunte hong khangin, a aw uh hong sangsak a, nakpi takin hong ging hi
A sangna munah a om Topa vanglian hi. Tui tampi gingte sangin vanglian zaw a, tuipi hualte sangin vanglian zaw hi
Na thupiaknate kip mahmah hi. Topa aw, siangthona pen a tawntungin na inn tawh a kilawm ahi hi.
